home.title: schul-dashboard — Free School Management for Students
home.description: The collaborative school management system by students for students. Tasks, timetable, groups, and more – all in one place.

features.title: Everything You Need to Stay on Top
features.description: Six core features designed around how students actually work — from daily tasks to group collaboration and everything in between.

tasks.title: Task & Homework Management
tasks.description: Create and track homework, tasks, and exams with due dates, attachments, and status indicators. Pin important items, archive old ones, and check off completed work — so nothing slips through the cracks.

schedule.title: Live Class Schedule
schedule.description: View your class schedule with real-time updates. Personalise your timetable by selecting only the courses you actually take, and always know what's coming up next.

groups.title: Class & Study Groups
groups.description: Every class or study group gets its own shared space. Join with a group name and password, or create your own. Switch between multiple groups instantly and keep everything organised.

private.title: Private Notes & Todos
private.description: Keep personal notes and todos encrypted and visible only to you. Track your own progress and reorder tasks with drag-and-drop — your private space, no one else's.

security.title: Built-In Security
security.description: Email verification, optional two-factor authentication, AES-256-GCM encrypted personal data, and CSRF protection — security is built in from the ground up, not added as an afterthought.

search.title: Instant Search & Shortcuts
search.description: A powerful command palette with keyboard shortcuts lets you reach anything in seconds. Stop clicking through menus — just search and jump straight to what you need.

product.title: School Management That Works for You
product.description: schul-dashboard is built around one belief: every student deserves great tools, for free, without compromise. No subscriptions. No ads. No paywalls.
product.included_description: No tiers, no feature locks. Every user gets the full product from day one.
product.feature0: Task and homework tracking with due dates and status
product.feature1: Live class schedule with personalised course selection
product.feature2: Shared spaces for classes and study groups
product.feature3: Encrypted private notes and personal todos
product.feature4: Admin tools for group moderation and announcements
product.feature7: Works on any device — no install required
product.price_description: schul-dashboard is and will always be completely free. We believe access to good tools shouldn't depend on your budget.

about.title: About schul-dashboard
about.description: We're a group of students who built the tool we wished we had. Here's why.
about.mission_text: We believe every student deserves access to a simple, free, and privacy-respecting school management system. Most tools are either too complex, filled with ads, or locked behind paywalls. We built schul-dashboard to change that — an open, honest platform developed by students, for students.
about.value_free_text: No subscriptions, no premium tiers, no hidden costs. The full product is free, and that will never change.
about.value_privacy_text: Personal data is encrypted. We don't sell data, we don't run ads, and we don't track you beyond what's necessary to run the service.
about.value_open_text: We're students ourselves. We build what we actually need, and we keep it honest and focused — no bloat, no corporate speak.
about.value_simple_text: Every feature is there because it solves a real problem. We cut everything that doesn't help you focus on school.
about.team_text: We're a small, motivated group of students who care about building things properly. We work on schul-dashboard because we believe in it — not for profit, but because it makes school life a little easier for everyone.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Have a question, found a bug, or want to share feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.email_description: Send us a message and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.discord_description: Join the community, ask questions, and connect with other users.

hero.title: School Management Made Simple
hero.description: All your tasks, timetable, and study groups in one place. Free, ad-free, and built by students who actually use it.
hero.social_proof: Free forever. No account required to explore.

footer.tagline: By students, for students. Free school management.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: Despite careful review, we accept no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How schul-dashboard handles your personal data.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: We take your privacy seriously. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller responsible for this service is schul-dashboard, reachable at contact{'@'}schul-dashboard.com.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.item0: Email address (for account creation and verification)
dataCollected.item1: Username (randomly generated to protect your identity in groups)
dataCollected.item2: Usage data necessary to provide the service (tasks, schedule, group memberships)

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: We collect and process your data solely to provide and improve the schul-dashboard service. We do not sell data to third parties and do not use it for advertising purposes.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.text: Your data is stored for as long as your account exists. You can delete your account at any time, after which your data will be permanently removed.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: Under applicable data protection law, you have the following rights:
rights.item0: Right of access to your personal data
rights.item1: Right to rectification of inaccurate data
rights.item2: Right to erasure of your data
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact us at contact{'@'}schul-dashboard.com.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: We use only technically necessary cookies — for session management, language preference, and color mode. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

security.title: Security
security.text: Personal data is protected using industry-standard encryption (AES-256-GCM). We use HTTPS throughout and employ CSRF protection and two-factor authentication options to secure your account.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.text: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or in-app notification.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.text: By using schul-dashboard, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the service.

service.title: The Service
service.text: schul-dashboard provides a free, web-based school management platform. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue features at any time, with notice where possible.

account.title: Your Account
account.item0: You must provide a valid email address to create an account.
account.item1: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure.
account.item2: You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.
account.item3: One account per person. Do not share accounts.

conduct.title: Acceptable Use
conduct.intro: You agree not to use schul-dashboard to:
conduct.item0: Upload or share illegal, harmful, or abusive content.
conduct.item1: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to other accounts or systems.
conduct.item2: Interfere with the service or its infrastructure.
conduct.item3: Use the service for commercial purposes without prior written consent.

termination.title: Termination
termination.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account at any time.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.text: schul-dashboard is provided as-is. We make no guarantees of uptime or data permanence. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from use of the service.

changes.title: Changes to These Terms
changes.text: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.text: These terms are governed by the laws of Germany. Any disputes shall be resolved in the competent courts of Germany.
